metadata.description: Slide generator template aligned to actual pptxgenjs output structure. Each slide_type maps directly to a rendering block in generate_slides.js. Supply new content in the 'slides' array and regenerate.
metadata.template: Netcompany CVI — dark teal / coral / gold palette
metadata.presentation_title: Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 – Feature Catalog
metadata.author: Nikolaj

design_tokens.note: Do not change these unless rebranding. They are consumed directly by generate_slides.js.

slide_types.note: Reference guide — each type name corresponds to a renderer in generate_slides.js.
slide_types.cover: Slide 1. Full-bleed dark teal. Fields: title, subtitle, audience_line, author.
slide_types.agenda: Slide 2. 2×3 grid of numbered group cards. Fields: header_title, header_subtitle, groups[].
slide_types.group_summary: Slide 3+. KPI row + left text + right table. One per initiative group.
slide_types.initiative_detail: Slides 4-5+. KPI row + left text + centre bar chart + right donut + PI planning boxes + footer bar. One per major initiative.
slide_types.next_steps: Last slide. Dark teal closer. Fields: title, subtitle, decisions[].

slides.header_subtitle: Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 — SteerCo Session

groups.title: Core Revenue Management Capabilities
groups.sub: Registration · Taxpayer Accounting · Billing · Exemptions · Penalty & Interest · Tax Accounts

groups.title: Core Supporting Capabilities
groups.sub: Supporting functions enabling the tax administration platform

groups.title: Non-Functional Requirement Coverage
groups.sub: Performance, security, reliability and compliance standards

groups.title: Reference Implementations
groups.sub: Baseline modules and reusable implementation patterns

groups.title: Core Data Hub Capabilities
groups.sub: Data integration, analytics and reporting infrastructure

slides.business_scope: Covers the foundational tax administration functions enabling tax authorities to manage the full lifecycle of taxpayer obligations — from registration and filing through billing, assessment, accounting, and penalty management.
market_needs_and_benefits: End-to-end taxpayer lifecycle management reduces administrative burden and manual errors
Automated penalty and interest calculations improve collection rates and reduce revenue leakage
Modular capability design allows onboarding of new tax types with minimal reconfiguration
Streamlined registration and billing processes reduce case handling time for tax officers
Supports regulatory compliance including audit trails and operational reporting

slides.header_subtitle: Core Revenue Management Capabilities | Initiative Detail
slides.business_scope: Enables tax authorities to manage the complete registration lifecycle — including party creation, identifier management, historical data tracking, and organisational hierarchy. Supports natural persons and legal entities with full audit traceability.
key_investment_benefits: Faster taxpayer onboarding reduces overhead and improves service delivery
Flexible party model supports VAT, CIT, and PAYE with full audit traceability
Structured identifiers and validation rules improve data quality across tax types

bands.note: Party Identifiers · Historical Data View · Additional Name Elements (3 features)
Data Area Enhancements · Search Enhancements (2 features) — confirm capacity now
Organisational Hierarchy View — GRC team alignment required before scoping

slides.header_subtitle: Core Revenue Management Capabilities | Initiative Detail
slides.business_scope: Provides tax authorities with a unified financial ledger for each taxpayer, recording all transactions including payments, credits, adjustments, and write-offs. Ensures accurate account balances and supports reconciliation across all tax types.
key_investment_benefits: Real-time balance visibility reduces disputes and improves taxpayer trust
Automated reconciliation eliminates manual posting errors
Single ledger supports multi-tax-type accounting for all periods
talking_points: Second-largest investment — foundational to revenue assurance
PI28 delivery critical — capacity must be confirmed now
All P1/P2 — no descoping without revenue risk
slides.steerco_footer: Second-largest investment — foundational to revenue assurance   ·   PI28 delivery must be confirmed   ·   All features P1/P2 — no descoping without revenue risk

slides.header_subtitle: Core Revenue Management Capabilities | Initiative Detail
slides.business_scope: Manages the generation, issuance, and tracking of tax bills and formal assessments, alongside configurable installment plan management. Enables revenue authorities to systematically collect outstanding liabilities while offering structured repayment arrangements to taxpayers.
key_investment_benefits: Automated billing reduces manual officer workload and accelerates revenue collection cycles
Structured installment plans increase voluntary compliance and recovery rates
Formal assessment workflows create enforceable legal liability records
Reduces revenue leakage by ensuring all liabilities are captured and tracked
talking_points: Billing and assessments are prerequisites for collections — sequence with Registration PI delivery
Installment plan scope is small and can provide quick win value in PI29
No features currently started — PI28 kickoff planning required immediately
slides.steerco_footer: Prerequisite for collections — sequence with Registration   ·   Installment plans = quick win in PI29   ·   No work started — PI28 kickoff required now

slides.title: Next Steps & Decision Points
slides.subtitle: Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 | SteerCo Session — 29 April 2026

decisions.detail: Validate delivery team capacity for Registration, Taxpayer Accounting, and Billing features planned in PI28. Flag any resource constraints to product leadership.
Both initiatives are P1/P2 with TBD effort estimates. Scope clarification sessions must be scheduled before PI28 planning begins.
Organisational Hierarchy View feature requires SteerCo alignment on priority and GRC team availability for PI29 delivery confirmation.
Small scope, P2 initiative with clear value. Recommend advancing delivery to PI28 to demonstrate early value to Greek Project stakeholders.
